settings.gg-G2DQtJ6W_text: All items must be added to the cart for the discount to apply. Returns must include all items received under the offer to qualify for a refund.
settings.gg7qDhWf_Gr_text: Offers are valid only during the advertised promotional period. Stock availability may vary, and no guarantees are made for product quantities. Returns or cancellations for promotional orders will be processed in accordance with our Returns Policy. We reserve the right to withdraw or amend promotions without notice. Errors and omissions excepted. Nothing in these terms affects your statutory consumer rights.
settings.ggWYF3lRKR0_text: These terms apply to all promotional offers (including discounts, giveaways, gifts with purchase, 1+1 offers, and “Golden Envelope” campaigns) organized by Korean Skincare B.V. Unless otherwise stated, promotions are open to customers residing in countries where we deliver. All promotional periods refer to Central European Time (CET) unless otherwise stated. Each promotion is time-limited (typically 24 hours unless otherwise stated), available only while stocks last, and subject to our standard Terms of Sale.
settings.ggs8qQ0ajyN_text: Selected orders may include a “Golden Envelope” with a unique discount code for future use. Distribution is random and limited in number. Codes are valid for one-time use only and are subject to expiry dates listed on the gift card. Korean Skincare B.V. is the sole organizer of this promotion.
settings.ggsBJDI5MvM_text: Open to residents in eligible countries listed on our website. No purchase necessary unless stated. Winners are chosen at random and notified via private message on Instagram. Prizes are non-transferable. We reserve the right to substitute a prize of equal value if necessary.
settings.ggwdQq5aM08_text: Discounts apply only to specified products and for the specified duration. Discounts cannot be combined with other vouchers, loyalty codes, or ongoing promotions. Prices displayed during the promotional period already include the discount.
settings.ggzmtMtkU3Z_text: Eligible customers will receive a complimentary product when purchasing qualifying items. The gift cannot be exchanged or refunded. If the qualifying order is returned, the gift must also be returned unused and unopened.

settings.ggon5JarYcQ_text: The Countdown to Christmas is Over!
settings.ggpaMe3tdQW_text: Thank you for letting us sprinkle a little holiday magic over your December. The last treat is unwrapped, the gingerbread cottage lights are dimmed, and the elves are curled up under a blanket of icing sugar, dreaming of next year. Wishing you the cosiest, cuddliest, most joyful holiday season, surrounded by love, laughter, and plenty of skincare treats under the tree. See you next year!
